description: Lion-bodied, human-torso'd deceivers luring victims with illusions and draining their will to resist.
subraces: Dune-stalking mirages posing as oasis guardians to draw in thirsty travelers.
Vine-draped ambushers hiding among ruins and using hypnotic patterns to ensnare explorers.
Aristocratic illusionists infiltrating courts by masking their beast-body with powerful glamours.
